completion: Streaks track how many days in a row you hit your goals! Keep your streak alive by checking in daily.
Streaks count consecutive days you've stuck to your habits. Miss a day and it resets — but you can always start again!
Streaks gamify consistency! They give you a little dopamine hit for staying on track. Small wins add up!
It happens! Don't stress — start a new one today. The habit is more important than the number.

prompt: How do I keep my streak?
completion: Check in every day! Even a small step counts. Consistency beats perfection.
The Arcade is where you earn rewards! Complete challenges, earn coins, and make saving fun.
You complete mini-challenges in the Arcade to earn coins and badges. It's like a game but for your wallet!
Weekly goals are easier to track than monthly ones. Small timeframes keep you focused and motivated!
Set a target, save towards it, and track your progress. When you hit it, you feel amazing!
Quests are mini-challenges you can complete for rewards! They make the app more fun and engaging.
Each quest has a task — like saving a certain amount or checking in daily. Complete it and earn rewards!
Badges are achievements you unlock! They celebrate milestones and keep you motivated.
Badges unlock when you hit certain milestones — like your first savings goal or a long streak!
Coins are rewards you earn! They're like points in a game — collect them for bragging rights.
Earn coins by completing quests, maintaining streaks, and hitting goals. The more you engage, the more you earn!
The leaderboard shows how you rank against friends! A little friendly competition never hurt anyone.
Check the Friends section! You can add friends and see how you stack up together.
Go to the Friends section and search by username or share your code. Then you can compete and compare!
A savings goal is a target you set — like saving for a trip or a new gadget. Track progress and celebrate when you hit it!

prompt: How do I set a goal?
completion: Tap on Goals and create one! Give it a name, amount, and deadline. Then watch yourself get closer!

prompt: What happens when I hit my goal?
completion: You get a nice celebration and probably some coins! Plus the satisfaction of actually saving for something.
Track your spending by category and see where your money goes. Knowledge is power!
We have categories like Food, Transport, Entertainment, Shopping, and more! Your spending gets sorted automatically.

prompt: How is this different from other apps?
completion: We gamify savings! Streaks, quests, badges — it's designed to make money management fun, not boring.
We focus on making it fun! No dry spreadsheets. Just goals, rewards, and a friendly AI coach — that's me!

prompt: How do I use this app?
completion: Add money, set goals, track spending, and chat with me! I'll help you understand your habits.
Goals, streaks, the Arcade, friends, leaderboards, spending tracking, and me — your friendly AI coach!
Designed with students in mind! Fun, simple, and perfect for learning to manage money early.
Your transactions get tracked automatically! Check the Spending section to see where your money goes.
Yes! We have charts and breakdowns so you can visualize your spending at a glance.
The home screen shows your balance, active goals, streak status, and quick actions. Everything at a glance!

prompt: How do I check my progress?
completion: Tap on Goals or your profile to see progress! Streaks, badges, and stats are all there.

prompt: What's the difference between goals and quests?
completion: Goals are personal savings targets. Quests are app challenges that earn you rewards. Both keep you engaged!
Absolutely! Add friends and check the leaderboard. A little competition makes saving more fun.
We send gentle reminders to check in, keep streaks, and celebrate milestones. Not spammy, just helpful!
Start by setting a simple goal! Even a small one. Then just track your spending and chat with me.
I help you understand spending patterns, stay motivated, and make money management feel less scary!

prompt: What questions can I ask you?
completion: Ask me about your spending, goals, streaks, or just chat! I'm here to help with anything money-related.

prompt: Can you remind me to save?
completion: The app sends reminders! I'm always here to encourage you when you check in too.

prompt: What if I don't have much money?
completion: That's okay! Even small amounts count. The point is building awareness and habits.
Yes! Your data is secure and we take privacy seriously. No worries there.
Transactions are logged in the app. You can view them by date or category anytime!
It shows how much you've spent over a period — daily, weekly, or monthly. Quick and informative!

prompt: How do I see my history?
completion: Check the Transactions or History section! All your past spending is there.
Check settings for export options! You should be able to get your data in a usable format.
Check your settings! We try to make the app comfortable to use anytime.
Colors usually represent categories or status — green is good, red might need attention. Pretty intuitive!

prompt: How often should I check in?
completion: Daily is great for keeping streaks! But even a few times a week helps build awareness.

prompt: What's the best way to use this app?
completion: Set a goal, check in regularly, and chat with me when you're curious! Consistency is key.
Start small! One goal, daily check-ins, and just explore. Don't try to be perfect — just be consistent.

prompt: How do I make the most of PocketPal?
completion: Engage with goals, quests, and streaks. The more you use it, the more beneficial it becomes!
Boss battles are special challenges where you 'fight' spending habits! Beat the boss by sticking to your goals.
You get a challenge — like reducing spending in a category. Succeed and you defeat the boss for rewards!
Gamification makes boring stuff fun! Saving money feels like a game instead of a chore.
Rewards give you something to work toward! They're little celebrations for good habits.
Your wallet shows your current balance and where money comes from. It's your financial hub!
Add money through the app based on what you actually receive. It helps us track your real balance!
It's a separate space for money you're saving. Keeps your savings separate from spending money!
Savings are based on what you set aside toward goals. The app tracks it all automatically!
Yes! Have as many goals as you want. Different goals, different targets, all tracked.

prompt: How do I delete a goal?
completion: Find the goal in settings and look for a delete or archive option. It's there!
Absolutely! Tap on a goal to edit the amount, name, or deadline. Flexibility is built in.

prompt: What if I miss my goal deadline?
completion: No penalty! Just reset and try again. The habit of setting goals is what matters.
Whatever works for you! Short-term goals are easier to track. Start with a week or month.
Something small and achievable! Like saving a little bit by the end of the week. Build confidence first.
Streaks, quests, and checking in with me! Gamification keeps things interesting.
Awareness is power! You can't improve what you don't measure. Tracking reveals patterns.

prompt: What can I learn from tracking?
completion: You'll discover patterns — where money goes, what triggers spending, and where you can save.
It's based on what's logged! The more you use it, the more accurate the picture becomes.
